step_rationale: Notch pathway regulator of endothelial function and angiogenesis; involved in vascular remodeling and inflammation.
mechanism: Jagged1 participates in Notch signaling controlling endothelial activation and angiogenesis, modulating vascular inflammation and remodeling in Type 1 MI.

references.title: Exploring Potential Drug Targets in Multiple Cardiovascular Diseases: A Study Based on Proteome-Wide Mendelian Randomization and Colocalization Analysis.
Endothelium-specific CYP2J2 overexpression improves cardiac dysfunction by promoting angiogenesis via Jagged1/Notch1 signaling.
references.journal: Journal of molecular and cellular cardiology
